title: Batshit crazy pairings
wikitext:
[]: Batshit crazy pairings. Post by SeanTucker » Tue Aug 26, 2008 8:55 pm Someone should try and use these in a fanfic: GNR/maggoty Asuka ...yeah. I have no idea how the hell this would work, but it would be... erm, interesting. Gendo/Asuka It's already implied that Gendo's fucking Rei. I mean, private tests? The fact that she contains a lot of Yui's genetic material? Come on, people. If he is, that would make him a pedo, and considering Asuka is generally portrayed as more sexual than Rei... yeah, you can see where I'm going with this. Ritsuko/Shinji This one's not really batshit crazy, but it's certainly unexplored territory to my knowledge, and it does imply (at least) that Ritsuko is a pedo, so I can see why people would be weary about using it. Jet Alone/EVA-02 This one's firmly in Rule 34 territory. I really don't want to think about the physics of it, or whether either robot even has sex organs.

[]: Re: Batshit crazy pairings. Post by ZapX » Tue Aug 26, 2008 9:57 pm SeanTucker wrote: Ritsuko/Shinji

[]: Post by chee » Tue Aug 26, 2008 10:18 pm Gendo/Winry/Diabetic L sandwich.

[]: Post by SeanTucker » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:26 pm chee wrote: Gendo/Winry/Diabetic L sandwich.

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:27 pm SeanTucker wrote: I was mainly intending to stick to Eva-only pairings. Crossovers open up a whole new can of worms. Dumbledore/Rei, anyone?

[]: Post by Formless One » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:29 pm SeanTucker wrote: I was mainly intending to stick to Eva-only pairings. Crossovers open up a whole new can of worms. Dumbledore/Fyutsuki, anyone?

[]: Post by SeanTucker » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:31 pm I know Dumbledore is gay. Re-read the topic title.

[]: Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:35 pm Edited.

[]: Post by Zeak » Tue Aug 26, 2008 11:54 pm Shinji Ritsuko i think that touches on angelic days she creepy in that

[]: Re: Batshit crazy pairings. Post by NemZ » Wed Aug 27, 2008 12:14 am Gendo/Asuka I read a fanfic to that angle once. Funny thing is Asuka was the one pushing things to try and get more control over her situation, driving Gendo up the damn wall as he tries to ignore or otherwise deal with her and continue to deny he wants some of that. Abandoned before she succeded in getting her lolita on and that's probably a good thing, but it was definately... interesting? Ritsuko/Shinji Uncommon, but not unheard of. I'm keeping up with a fic at the moment called 'Remember Me' with a divergent storyline that also bluntly says Shinji -did- get down to buisness with Misato earlier, who is essentially the jealous ex at this point. Oh, btw gendo, Rei, and Asuka all left the stage in this universe's version of 3I, which didn't actually go down.

[]: Post by Formless One » Wed Aug 27, 2008 12:20 am Asuka/Rei. That is all.

[]: Post by CorporalChaos » Wed Aug 27, 2008 12:44 am batshit crazy, eh? Psycho choking Shinji/Shouting Asuka You know the scenes I'm talking about, and you put those two together in those states of mind.

[]: Post by Zeak » Wed Aug 27, 2008 4:21 am Ok Ok Ok I have the best one of all Seemings this is the fan wank area. Akara and Reichu... It could never happen but would seem logical Just like Zuggys commic

[]: Post by ZapX » Wed Aug 27, 2008 7:43 am Zeak wrote: Akara and Reichu...

[]: Post by The Bastard King » Wed Aug 27, 2008 9:15 am I'd request Shinji/Magi, but I'm pretty sure that's already been done. More then once.

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Aug 27, 2008 10:44 am request for that Akira MS Paint atrocity become Reichu's avatar (for at least a li'l while anyway)

[]: Post by chee » Wed Aug 27, 2008 10:46 am THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: request for that Akira MS Paint atrocity become Reichu's avatar (for at least a li'l while anyway)

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 27, 2008 11:31 am I've got one for you that while is batshit insane I like a lot. Asuka x Kaworu Discuss.

[]: Post by Iron Rooster » Wed Aug 27, 2008 11:33 am Rei I X Keel

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Aug 27, 2008 11:35 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Asuka x Kaworu Discuss.
